title: A Tech Correction
summary:
Main
By George Lagarias
The emergence of Deepseek, a Chinese Large Language Model which can compete with its Western counterparts at much lower costs and using less high-end tech catalysed a correction for the technology sector and especially Nvidia. US large caps were down nearly 1.5% on Monday and Nvidia had lost nearly 20% of its value from its recent highs. We have often said that valuations were high and that the market was susceptible to a correction (although the timings are always unsure).
